_meta.purpose: Bridges biome-string outputs from the geographic system (systems/geography/biome_generator.py) onto canonical chunkType keys defined in Definitions.JSON/Chunk-templates-*.JSON. Loaded by ChunkTemplateDatabase at startup; consulted by systems/chunk.py:_determine_chunk_type when GeographicData is present on a chunk.
_meta.design_note: This file used to live as a code-locked dict in systems/chunk.py:_GEO_TO_CHUNK_TYPE. Externalizing it here lets the designer adjust mappings without code edits and lets generated chunk templates introduce new geo_type entries via their geoTypes array (sacred entries below win on collision).
_meta.extension_via_generated_templates: WES-generated chunk templates may declare a top-level geoTypes:["..."] array. Each entry in that array is auto-registered as geo_type → template.chunkType ONLY when this file does not already map that geo_type. Designer keeps full control of the canonical mapping.
